message.content: @startuml title Sequence Diagram Test participant "alice: Orange World" as alice actor ": Bob" as bob == Initialization == bob ->> alice : Hi activate alice note right of alice #ffcccc\n Hello\nfrom __Bob__\nnote end deactivate alice alt [successful case] bob <-+ alice : ACK else [failure case] group Multiple failure messages note left of bob This will be displayed over ''several'' lines. end note alt [[message lost]] message loss warning bob <--x alice else timeout hide footbox loop Retry attempts by sender bob -->> alice : Auth Req end show footbox end end end return Message status update to caller... @enduml
